GROUP.noreg: No se encontraron registros para los filtros seleccionados.

qry:select.name: QRY_CONCEPTOS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ14.oi_concepto, LIQ14.c_concepto, LIQ14.d_concepto, LIQ14.o_concepto, LIQ02.d_grupo_tliq, LIQ12.d_tipo_concepto, LIQ13.d_clase_concepto, LIQ24.d_grupo_empresa, LIQ14.ca_fig_recibo, LIQ14.ca_acum_ganancia, LIQ14.ca_tipo_asiento, LIQ14.l_activo, LIQ14.e_secuencia FROM LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as LIQ14, LIQ02_GRUPOS_TLIQ as LIQ02, LIQ12_TIPOS_CONC as LIQ12, LIQ13_CLASES_CONC as LIQ13, LIQ24_GRUPOS_EMPRE as LIQ24
JOIN liq14.oi_grupo_tliq left outer liq02.oi_grupo_tliq, LIQ14.oi_tipo_concepto INNER LIQ12.oi_tipo_concepto, LIQ13.oi_clase_concepto right outer LIQ14.oi_clase_concepto, LIQ24.oi_grupo_empresa right outer LIQ14.oi_grupo_empresa WHERE 1=1 {%? (string(#SOURCE:CONCEPTOS/CONCEPTO/@id)!='') {% AND LIQ14.OI_CONCEPTO in ({%=string(#SOURCE:CONCEPTOS/CONCEPTO/@id) %}) %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_tipo_concepto!='') {% AND LIQ14.oi_tipo_concepto = {#SOURCE:@oi_tipo_concepto} %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_clase_concepto!='') {% AND LIQ14.oi_clase_concepto = {#SOURCE:@oi_clase_concepto} %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ca_fig_recibo!='') {% AND LIQ14.ca_fig_recibo={#SOURCE:@ca_fig_recibo} %} {% %} %} AND LIQ14.l_activo= 1 AND LIQ12.l_nolistado = 0
ORDER BY {%? (#SOURCE:@ATRIB_ORDEN1!='') {% {%=#SOURCE:@ATRIB_ORDEN1%} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDEN1!='') {% {%=#SOURCE:@ORDEN1%}, %} {% ASC, %} %} %} {% %} %} OI_CONCEPTO ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_VAR
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ09.c_tipo_variable, LIQ09.c_variable, LIQ09.d_variable, LIQ09.c_tipo_dato, LIQ14.c_tipo_parametro
FROM LIQ09_VARIABLES as LIQ09, LIQ14_CONC_VAR as LIQ14 JOIN LIQ14.oi_variable INNER LIQ09.oi_variable WHERE LIQ14.oi_concepto = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_concepto %} and LIQ09.c_tipo_variable in (\'1\',\'2\',\'3\',\'4\') ')/ROWS/ROW
